title: FireMon Create Policy Planner Ticket
content:
Creates a new Policy Planner Ticket for PolicyPlanner in FMOS box.

Cortex XSOAR/XSIAM SOAR playbook from the FireMon pack (FireMonSecurityManager, community-supported).

Inputs — Domain Id: Enter Domain Id (Integer); Workflow Name: Enter Workflow Name; Requirements: Enter list of Requirements containing Sources, Service, Destinations and Action; Priority: Set the Priority; Due Date: Enter Due date.

Integrations/scripts used: IsIntegrationAvailable, firemon-create-pp-ticket.

      type: regular

      brand: ""
    nexttasks:
      '#none#':
      - "5"

      domain_id:

      due_date:

      priority:
        simple: ${incident.priority}
      requirement:
